catalog_content:
Item Name: McCabe Organic Tamalpais Hulless Barley - Organic Whole Barley Grain 3Lbs | Rich with Fiber & Minerals | USDA and CCOF Certified | Product of USA
Bullet Point 1: Premium Tamalpais Hulless Barley: McCabe Organic Tamalpais Hulless Barley is a testament to our commitment to delivering excellence in organic grains. Sourced from the fertile fields of Southern California, our barley stands as a beacon of quality and taste.
Bullet Point 2: Packed for Perfection: Our Tamalpais Hulless Barley is a California-grown gem, meticulously selected and packaged to ensure the utmost in flavor and nutritional value. As part of our comprehensive range of organic offerings, this barley product adheres to the highest standards of quality.
Bullet Point 3: Nutritional Powerhouse: Packed with fiber and beta-glucan, two vital elements for promoting a healthy lifestyle. Additionally, it boasts a rich profile of vitamins, minerals, and other plant-based compounds that enhance overall well-being.
Bullet Point 4: Cooking Perfection: Begin by soaking the barley in water for approximately 12 hours, then drain it. In a spacious pot, combine 2 cups of water or vegetable broth with 2/3 cup of rinsed barley. To prevent overflow, partially cover the pot. Bring this hearty mix to a boil, then reduce the heat to a gentle simmer and allow it to cook for 25 to 30 minutes and enjoy.
Bullet Point 5: Our Story: McCabe Organic takes pride in offering a wide range of premium organic products,all sourced from Southern California. Committed to quality management, we adhere to the rigorous standards of USDA and CCOF Organic certifications. Our journey is rooted in a passion for promoting organic choices and supporting a healthier lifestyle for our valued customers.
Value: 32.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic product with USDA and CCOF certifications, indicating high-quality sourcing and production. The packaging is standard for organic grains, and the product is positioned as a health-focused, nutrient-rich option. The price is likely reflective of its organic certification and premium quality.

Product Description: Indulge in the perfect blend of smooth and crunchy with this extra crunchy peanut butter that comes in a convenient pack of two 28-ounce jars. Each spoonful delivers a satisfying crunch from premium roasted peanuts, creating an irresistible texture that peanut butter lovers crave. This versatile spread is perfect for classic PB&J sandwiches, morning toast, or adding protein-rich flavor to your favorite recipes. The generous 28-ounce size ensures you'll have plenty on hand for all your snacking and cooking needs, while the two-pack format means you won't run out quickly.
